name: Laptop
description:
High performance laptop suitable for coding, gaming and multitasking.
Comes with fast processor, SSD storage and long battery backup.

name: Smartphone
description:
Latest smartphone with powerful processor and high-quality camera.
Offers smooth performance, long battery life and sleek design.

name: Headphones
description:
Noise cancelling headphones for immersive audio experience.
Comfortable design with deep bass and long listening hours.

name: Smart Watch
description:
Smart watch with fitness tracking and health monitoring features.
Tracks steps, heart rate and provides smart notifications.

name: Keyboard
description:
Mechanical keyboard with responsive keys for fast typing.
Durable build with comfortable and smooth key feedback.

name: Mouse
description:
Wireless mouse with smooth tracking and ergonomic design.
Easy to use, portable and perfect for daily work.

name: Tablet
description:
Portable tablet device for entertainment and productivity.
Lightweight design with clear display and long battery life.

name: Camera
description:
Digital HD camera for capturing high-quality photos and videos.
Perfect for photography with clear zoom and sharp image quality.

name: Speaker
description:
Bluetooth speaker with powerful sound and deep bass.
Portable design with long battery backup for music anywhere.

name: Monitor
description:
24 inch LED monitor with clear and vibrant display quality.
Ideal for office work, gaming and multimedia usage.

name: Power Bank
description:
Fast charging power bank for charging devices on the go.
Compact design with high capacity and safety protection.

name: Router
description:
High speed WiFi router for stable and fast internet connection.
Provides wide coverage and supports multiple devices.
